items.label: Focus
items.value: AI workflow / Agent product / RAG / B2B SaaS

content: AI solution product experience: participated in an enterprise AI customer-service project, covering scenario definition, competitor research, solution design, and workflow planning.
Business impact: reduced manual handling time through information reuse, field extraction, missing-field follow-up, user confirmation, and human-review handoff.
Dify workflow: built a multi-node market research report workflow covering Excel parsing, evidence normalization, analysis matrix, insight generation, QA, and PPT rendering.
CareerReach AI: built a local job-search agent system with Data/Communication agents, CLI tools, ChromaDB/RAG memory, and personalized outreach generation.
